title: Carduus hillii
taxonomy: Carduus hillii is a species of thistle, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The genus Carduus is a group of thistle plants native to Europe and Asia. It is classified as a biennial or short-lived perennial plant. The classification of Carduus hillii can be further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Asterales. Carduus hillii is closely related to other thistle species within the same family and genus.
